payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Like Donald Sutherland in The Body Snatchers! Perfect! Perfect. I'll probably do that from now on. Next announcement. It recently kicked off, Patrick Rothfuss started a wonderful charity these past couple of years called World Builders. You can find it at worldbuilders.org and he's asked us to help be part of that process, to promote it, to get the word out there and hopefully next year be even more involved on a physical level. But if you want to check it out, it's a fantastic gathering of authors, writers, and creative minds to help bring together those of our community to help make the world a better place. Go check it out at worldbuilders.org, see if it's something you want to be a part of, donate what you can. It's a fantastic cause, and they've done incredible work these past few years. So we invite you to join us as I'm also giving a bunch to it, and we're helping to keep this promo chain going for the next month, as long as it's going, so go ahead and take a look, and be a part of it. Thank you, Patrick, for including us in this awesomeness. We're happy to be a part. Also! We have a new round of playlists that have begun. We did the character playlists last year that seemed to go over pretty well. The first one went up last week with Vax's playlist.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've got to get that unicorn, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That unicorn, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a great shirt.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's my favorite shirt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I spot them every now and then in the wild and it's one of the weirdest experiences of my whole life. "Should I say something? I don't know, I feel like I should."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just go (inarticulate noise)--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And these ones, these ones are in stock, so they're not pre-order.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. It'll give you two weeks to build your characters, great!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It'll be good. It'll be at a restart, when we all die.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Probably not. However, I would like to ask you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So the blue thing is the magical door?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To give you guys some context, set-wise. This is the doorway, the entrance to Scanlan's mansion. Big as the doorway you could have made. Back here is Keyleth, who had fired off the spell. Here we have Vex and Trinket, who you had popped out, as well as Vax, who had just stepped out of the portal. Scanlan, with in front of you, the two boys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: In front of him?! They were in front of him?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We were sending them off to be sold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but I thought you were holding out the chain and they were standing behind you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I was holding the chain and they stepped forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Grog was off here to the side. Here we have Ghurrix himself as well as his ally companion and a number of other slavers and/or slaves that currently line the streets as part of this, who are now watching as this conflict may seem to erupt here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Narrator slash Dungeon Master? What are those guards? There's guards in the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I looked for them the last game, and they're not around right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are efreet. You didn't see any around at the moment, no. And they are called the Illuminated.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Does his companion have a name?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know. You can certainly ask.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And what's behind the pit fiend where the map disappears? Is there building there or what?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is an edge to a building there and part of a thoroughfare walkway.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How many stories is the building behind them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say probably two stories.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is that building made of sharp spikes that if we destroyed the building it would kill the bad guy?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Or you could do Channel Divinity, if you prefer that. No, it hasn't been seven days, so she can't do it yet. Since the Vorugal battle.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good! I want to do that!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's not how that works.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But there's a radius blast thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Radius blast, but that's not a second level or lower.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You know what, we'll say for the purposes of this, if you want to cast Aid on somebody, otherwise, right now, you'll have to miss the turn. Because we have to keep this going.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, okay, fine! I'll do Aid, I guess. Why not?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Up to three creatures within 30 feet. Their maximum hit points increase by five.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's going to be huge. So the only people that are in range are Trinket, Grog, and me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Scanlan, technically.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And, technically, me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog, Pike, and Scanlan would all work if you wanted to do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So Grog, Pike, and Scanlan. You don't need it, though. Do you need it? I'm going to go Trinket--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Or you could do Channel Divinity, if you prefer that. No, it hasn't been seven days, so she can't do it yet. Since the Vorugal battle.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good! I want to do that!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's not how that works.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But there's a radius blast thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Radius blast, but that's not a second level or lower.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You know what, we'll say for the purposes of this, if you want to cast Aid on somebody, otherwise, right now, you'll have to miss the turn. Because we have to keep this going.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, okay, fine! I'll do Aid, I guess. Why not?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Up to three creatures within 30 feet. Their maximum hit points increase by five.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's going to be huge. So the only people that are in range are Trinket, Grog, and me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Scanlan, technically.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And, technically, me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog, Pike, and Scanlan would all work if you wanted to do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So Grog, Pike, and Scanlan. You don't need it, though. Do you need it? I'm going to go Trinket--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Actually, no, we'll let Grog go first since you guys decided to do that. I'll switch you in the order here. Grog first.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: In the immortal words of Laura Bailey, "Mother bitch!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18 points of bludgeoning damage, plus 29 points of fire damage. To the head. (whack)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, that hurts.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The mace bursts into flame as soon as it begins to arc toward her. As it hits her in the side, you watch her stumble into the side of the alleyway, the blood pouring from her face. The flames burn the edges of her hair. The mace is now alight, angrily.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: My antlers and my hair!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That end your turn, Keyleth?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Her head is on fire!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth, you're done? Vax, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Still, even though we established Grog first? I'll go first.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'm going to check one thing in here, real fast. There actually is, as I found out later on, there is a rule for lava damage. I want to make sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm not going to do any good up here. I still have my movement, right? I'm going to try some stupid shit. Since the axe is in his back, can I Indiana Jones down to the ground? (singing Indiana Jones theme song) Just, (yelling) trying to get down to the ground or underneath him. I may hit the ground, but maybe it will be slowed by the--?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I need you to roll an acrobatics check to land this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I understand.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are heavy, and the chain itself is going to come loose as you come down, so roll an acrobatics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not great. Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You swing, and you land. You stumble. You roll and land straight into the lava.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (yells)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Think of the burn scars. You'll look so cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, why is he looking at something?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You can move around this direction, try and do it there. So burst that way. Just wanted to make sure you're aware of-- All right. Rolled two threes in a row. Does not save.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I couldn't have run up and looked at her, to know it was poison? To see the black around her fucking--? Cool. 27 for the attack on Trinket, and then that is a 14, no, that's a lie. 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Good to know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If I move, I'll get attacked.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you will.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to die.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth, your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'm going to Sunbeam She-Ra right in the face.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I love that that's her unofficial name. Announce yourself, woman! Thing! Whatever!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just say, I'm sorry, what's your name?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From this perspective, you will hit him with your Sunbeam.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I can fly, so can I scooch around?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: This whole thing's been, roughly, from beginning to end, about two minutes, yeah. From a spatial positioning standpoint. Okay! It has to make a wisdom saving throw. Because technically you are fighting the creature because Grog made it hostile again, it does get advantage on the saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How much does that heal?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yay! Thank you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Looking much better than you did a second ago. That ends your turn, Pike, or are you going to do anything else?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stay here in the mansion because I'm useless.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan, you're now about to be flanked by a series of efreet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I take one step closer to the efreet, putting me within 30 feet of him. I will hand cone up, and I will sing to him to try to charm him. I'll sing: (sings) my Grog don't like you, and he likes everyone! And I should have known that you'd try to run! But I got so caught up in my spells I didn't see that you were trying to rat me out! But I can't do that right now! I don't know. So I'm going to cast Modify Memory at sixth level.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Oh!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten minutes have not gone by! This whole thing's taken two minutes, right?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You watch its eyes glaze over for a minute, and the flame flickers out in its hand as it drops to the side. What are you doing? What are you modifying?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I use my Luck on him? I have one left. Watching this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I think it may be just an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's why I'm going to check, yo.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm wrong about a lot of things, Matt. In-game and out of game.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm glad you're using it on enemy rolls now!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's nothing in that book that says he can't! There's something in this book that says something much worse.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Have you looked at the table of contents yet? You should look at the table of contents. It'll make you really happy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can also spend a luck point when an attack roll is made against you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just attack rolls, all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That would've been really powerful.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: "Abuses of the Clergy"?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's my favorite chapter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's cocked. That is 19. What is your spell DC, again?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You did, yeah. So as you guys finish a short rest, you've taken in the circumstance. You've narrowly avoided a very, very bad situation with the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, grapple is different from restrained. With the rope, yeah, you can do that. You're your own moving gallows.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It can be destroyed. It has 20 hit points and an AC of 20. Is it limited by the size of the creature?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I can't restrain a fire giant?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Probably not going to work on Thordak, just saying.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: These boots appear to actually be boots that my people might have made. They are Boots of Spider Climbing. The wearer can spend an action to cast Spider Climb on themselves, no concentration required. The effect lasts for an hour. Spider Climb lets you-- I go to Percy. He's waving dibs.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes, no, this is definitely for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does anybody want this rope?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hello.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You want the Rope of Entanglement?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I healed to 74, B-T-W.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did I say what I healed to? I did, right?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'd say, with you guys not having a guide and trying to go off memory in coasting through, it'll take you a little over an hour, but you do find it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Look, he mentioned, "Let me give you a trinket in case you all leave so I can find you again."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: In case.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But he's expecting it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but then we put it in his court when he shows up. Favors.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Is it a bad idea to just be like  We're all done. We just got to go do a thing. You know where we are. We'll be right back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. I guess we can talk to him. I'm just afraid he'll try and cash in on it right now and not let us leave.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Then we'll settle this. We don't want Garth from Wayne's World to have anything on our heads.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Also, we're mostly nice people, but I'm pretty sure Grog could crush him like an accordion. We're not going to do that, but we can set the terms of the favor a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Then let's fucking go!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's go get Senokir.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How far of a walk is it?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: With the full rest you took to prepare for your encounter with the pit fiend and the travelling to and from, probably close to two days. Anyway, we'll pick that up next week.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Consequences.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And cows.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Consequences and cows.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Man, maybe we shouldn't have gone back to Senokir.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How long were we gone? Do you have any rough estimate?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How long was I gone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How long was I out for, man?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Oh, two weeks. Yeah, that's right. Two weeks from now, because Thanksgiving.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Consequences.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And cows.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Consequences and cows.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Man, maybe we shouldn't have gone back to Senokir.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How long were we gone? Do you have any rough estimate?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How long was I gone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How long was I out for, man?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With the full rest you took to prepare for your encounter with the pit fiend and the travelling to and from, probably close to two days. Anyway, we'll pick that up next week.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Two weeks from now.
